description_long: This internet cafe features a compact, rectangular room with orange and beige walls and a red-and-white checkered floor. The main wall is decorated with multiple posters, illuminated signage, and gaming-themed artwork, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere. At the center, a modern gaming setup is visible, including a large monitor, a gaming chair, and a desktop computer on a sleek desk. The room is well-lit, with a strip of multicolored LED lighting running along the top of the back wall, enhancing the energetic ambiance. The overall design is functional and visually appealing, with a focus on gaming culture and comfort. The exterior sides and back are plain, emphasizing the interior's decorative and interactive elements.
description: A vibrant, gaming-themed internet cafe room with orange walls, checkered flooring, and a central computer station surrounded by posters and LED lighting.
description_view_0: A plain, beige exterior wall with no visible features or decorations.
description_view_1: The detailed interior of the internet cafe, showing the gaming setup, posters, illuminated signage, and checkered floor.
description_view_2: Another plain, beige exterior wall, similar to view 0, with no visible features.
description_view_3: The top of the cafe, displaying a smooth orange surface with a reversed illuminated sign visible near the edge.
attribute_signage: Illuminated blue and white sign reading 'JUKAIN FF' in English, mounted on the back wall above the computer stations, with additional gaming-themed posters and plaques.
attribute_computer_station_visibility: One main computer station is visible, centrally placed with a gaming chair, monitor, desktop, and peripherals; additional seating or stations are not visible.
attribute_neon_lighting: A strip of multicolored LED lighting runs along the top of the back wall, providing a modern, vibrant accent.
